## Faits

- editor: neovim

## Notes
- legacy always-on note

## Rappels
- deploy needs the fly CLI installed [tags: deploy]
- deploy rollbacks use fly releases and this pointer line is deliberately long enough to be clipped in the preview rendering [tags: ops]
- deploy dashboards live in grafana
- … autres notes : « deploy secrets come from the vault »
